mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.search_popularity_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, search_term, search_count, click_count, conversion_count, avg_results_returned, last_searched_at ) SELECT 'search-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC), 'homebase', NOW(), sl.search_term, COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(sl.click_count), 0), COALESCE(SUM(sl.conversion_count), 0), COALESCE(AVG(sl.results_count), 0), MAX(sl.created_time) FROM hm_analytics.search_log sl WHERE sl.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY sl.search_term ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10000
